message:
refactor(email): Implement CPython-compatible email submodules

Implement proper CPython-compatible APIs for all email submodules:

- errors.zig: All defect types (MessageDefect, HeaderDefect, etc.)
  and error types (MessageError, MessageParseError, etc.)
- feedparser.zig: FeedParser, BytesFeedParser with DRY re-export
- charset.zig: Charset class with encoding types and aliases
- iterators.zig: body_line_iterator, typed_subpart_iterator, walk
- base64mime.zig: header_encode, body_encode, decode for MIME base64
- quoprimime.zig: quote, unquote, header_encode, decode for QP
- contentmanager.zig: ContentManager class with get/set handlers
- headerregistry.zig: Address, Group, BaseHeader, DateHeader,
  AddressHeader, ContentTypeHeader, MIMEVersionHeader, HeaderRegistry
- _encoded_words.zig: RFC 2047 encoded word handling (decode, encode)
- _header_value_parser.zig: RFC 5322 header value parser with
  HeaderValueParser, Token types, and parsing functions
- _parseaddr.zig: Legacy address parsing (parseaddr, formataddr,
  AddressList) with DRY re-export from utils
- _policybase.zig: PolicyBase, Compat32, ModernEmailPolicy with
  DRY re-export from policy module

All implementations follow DRY pattern and include unit tests.
